en_title: Medieval: Chronicles Looks to Offer Deep Strategic Gameplay Along With Gruesome Up-Close Action Combat | IGN Preview
cn_title: 《中世纪编年史》前瞻：战略与血腥近战结合
subtitle: 弓与剑的召唤
opus_summary: 新工作室Raw Power Games的沙盒RPG《中世纪编年史》融合第三人称动作战斗与大规模战略指挥，支持最多2000人同屏战斗。连击系统可破防处决，士气系统影响战局。汤姆·哈迪与拉尔斯·米科尔森加盟配音，计划今年晚些时候开启抢先体验。

paragraphs.en: I have always found myself drawn more to bows and arrows than guns and bullets. To cavalry over tanks. Elder Scrolls over Fallout. So when new studio Raw Power Games revealed its debut title, Chronicles: Medieval, back at Summer Games Fest last year, my interest was immediately piqued. Now, a year later, Raw Power is back, giving us a better peek at what players can expect from the blood-soaked battlefields of Chronicles: Medieval.
paragraphs.cn: 我向来更偏爱弓箭而非枪炮，骑兵而非坦克，《上古卷轴》而非《辐射》。因此，当新工作室 Raw Power Games 在去年的夏日游戏节上公布其首款作品《中世纪编年史》(Chronicles: Medieval)时，我立刻来了兴趣。一年后的今天，Raw Power 再次归来，让我们得以一窥《中世纪编年史》那血染沙场的真容。

paragraphs.en: To catch you up, Chronicles: Medieval is a sandbox RPG that mixes third-person action combat with larger strategic-based battles where you assume the role of an army’s commander. Set during the period of the Hundred Years’ War in Europe, your time will be spent earning renown, recruiting troops, waging battles, and growing your legacy. Serving as one of the core pillars that Medieval has been built around, these battles will range from smaller skirmishes of a mere 20 soldiers all the way up to large-scale battles with 2,000 at your command.
paragraphs.cn: 简单来说，《中世纪编年史》是一款沙盒RPG，融合了第三人称动作战斗与大规模战略指挥，你将扮演军队指挥官。游戏背景设定在欧洲百年战争时期，你将通过赢得声望、招募士兵、发动战斗来壮大自己的传奇。作为游戏的核心支柱之一，战斗规模从仅20人的小规模冲突，到指挥2000人的大型战役不等。

paragraphs.en: Battles look to be divided into two main approaches - a battlefield view to give directions to your forces, and directly controlling your character over their shoulder. Giving orders to your army will look and feel a bit familiar to fans of other medieval strategy games, where you will be aligning your troops into various formations. Battle planning will begin before the first arrow is even shot. During this preparation, Medieval has you organize your forces into “battle lines”, positioning them in your starting lines from a high-in-the-sky vantage point, and giving them their initial actions. Raw Power explains that these act as a sort of underlying “rule” that your AI units will follow during the battle.
paragraphs.cn: 战斗似乎分为两种主要模式：一种是战场视角，用于向部队下达指令；另一种是越肩视角，直接控制你的角色。向军队下达指令的方式，对其他中世纪策略游戏玩家来说会有些熟悉——你需要将部队排列成各种阵型。战斗计划在箭矢射出之前就已开始。在准备阶段，你需要将部队组织成「战线」，从高空俯瞰视角布置初始位置，并下达初始行动指令。Raw Power 解释称，这些相当于一种底层「规则」，你的AI单位将在战斗中遵循。

paragraphs.en: While playing battlefield commander is neat and all, I’m more excited about assuming direct control of my character and heading to the front lines. I enjoy a good strategy game as much as the next knight, but sometimes I just want to swing my sword around and hit things. Speaking to members of the development team, Medieval’s action combat will utilize a combo system that incentivizes you breaking an enemy’s posture (sounds a bit like stamina from a FromSoftware game), allowing you to pull off a gruesome execution attack.
paragraphs.cn: 当战场指挥官固然不错，但我更兴奋的是直接控制角色冲上前线。我和其他骑士一样喜欢策略游戏，但有时我只想挥剑砍杀。据开发团队成员透露，《中世纪编年史》的动作战斗将采用连击系统，鼓励你打破敌人的架势（听起来有点像 From Software 游戏中的精力条），从而发动血腥的处决攻击。

paragraphs.en: Besides looking sweet, with blood splattering across the screen, performing these attacks with your own forces around to see looks to have a far more important effect - boosting morale. Morale among your troops (ranging from Inspired / Confident / Concerned / Wavering / Broken) will allow your men to fight better while inspired. On the flip side, should their wills ever be broken, it may cause them to flee in terror, causing a rout and losing you the battle. Your enemies have their own morale too, and breaking them will cause a similar outcome, allowing you the choice to spare or run down the escaping forces.
paragraphs.cn: 除了视觉效果酷炫、鲜血飞溅屏幕之外，在己方部队面前执行这些攻击还有一个更重要的效果——提升士气。部队的士气状态（分为振奋/自信/担忧/动摇/崩溃）会影响战斗力：士气高昂时士兵作战更勇猛；反之，一旦意志崩溃，他们可能会惊恐逃散，导致溃败并输掉战斗。敌人也有自己的士气，击垮他们同样会引发溃逃，届时你可以选择放过或追击溃军。

paragraphs.en: On that topic, the folks at Raw Power talked briefly about how this would work, or at least a component of it. As you progress through the campaign, while on the “Exploration Map” (which is where it seems like more of the RPG-ish elements will be found), one such option is with the recruitable mercenaries. The specifics of how this will all work remains a mystery for now, but the general gist is that paying these potential allies - ranging in quality and strength - will bring them to your cause. I look forward to making my own little medieval version of Outer Heaven in Chronicles: Medieval one day.
paragraphs.cn: 关于这一点，Raw Power 的团队简要介绍了其运作方式，至少是其中一部分。在战役进程中，当你处于「探索地图」（似乎包含更多RPG元素）时，其中一个选项是招募雇佣兵。具体机制目前仍是个谜，但大致思路是：通过支付报酬，这些质量与实力各异的潜在盟友便会加入你的阵营。我很期待有朝一日在《中世纪编年史》中打造属于自己的中世纪版「世外天堂」。

paragraphs.en: Raw Power briefly touched on a number of exciting other features that will be added closer to launch to shake up combat even further. The big one has to be the addition of sieges. The idea of laying siege to a massive castle sets my nerdy heart all aflutter, and paired with a weather system that will impact battles, really gets my blood going. Unfortunately, Raw Power didn’t have any real specifics in terms of timing. On the plus side, fans can look forward to pretty weather effects sooner, albeit without any gameplay effect, being purely cosmetic.
paragraphs.cn: Raw Power 还简要提及了其他一些令人兴奋的功能，这些功能将在临近发售时加入，进一步丰富战斗体验。其中最重要的当属攻城战。围攻一座巨大城堡的想法让我这个宅男心潮澎湃，再加上会影响战斗的天气系统，更是让我热血沸腾。可惜的是，Raw Power 并未透露具体时间。好消息是，粉丝们很快就能看到漂亮的天气效果，尽管目前只是纯装饰，没有实际游戏影响。

paragraphs.en: Rounding out our look at the Medieval’s combat, the Raw Power crew had one last surprise for us. The original announcement trailer featured the voice work of actor Tom Hardy narrating the dramatic trailer, but that isn’t all the star power that Raw Power is looking to bring to bear. Grand Admiral Thrawn himself, Lars Mikkelsen, will be adding his voice to the cast in some fashion. Specifics on who the prolific Danish actor is unclear, but no doubt he will bring his signature gravitas and weight to whatever situation puts your character and him in way of one another.
paragraphs.cn: 在介绍完《中世纪编年史》的战斗后，Raw Power 团队还给了我们最后一个惊喜。最初的预告片由演员汤姆·哈迪配音，但这还不是 Raw Power 带来的全部明星阵容。「索龙元帅」本人拉尔斯·米科尔森也将以某种方式加盟配音。这位多产的丹麦演员具体饰演什么角色尚不清楚，但毫无疑问，无论你的角色与他以何种方式相遇，他都将带来标志性的庄重与分量。

paragraphs.en: Raw Power is still keeping much of Chronicles: Medieval close to their chainmail vests, and despite the team’s planned early access later this year, we still know very little about how Chronicles as a whole will work and play. The team began posting dev diaries back in April detailing their plans for some mechanics and their general philosophy , but outside of those, we only have the two trailers to really see things in action. The frequency of these, we’re told, will be ramping up here shortly, so hopefully the fog that currently lays heavy on the fields of Burgundy and this game will soon be lifted.
paragraphs.cn: Raw Power 对《中世纪编年史》的大部分内容仍守口如瓶。尽管团队计划在今年晚些时候开启抢先体验，但我们对游戏的整体运作和玩法仍知之甚少。团队从四月开始发布开发者日记，详细介绍了部分机制的设计思路和总体理念，但除此之外，我们只能通过两支预告片来一窥实际效果。据称，这些内容的发布频率很快就会提高，希望笼罩在勃艮第田野和这款游戏上的迷雾能早日散去。

paragraphs.en: Between Chronicles: Medieval providing me a more grounded-in-reality and historical adventure, and the high medieval fantasy of Crimson Desert from earlier this year, I should have all my sword-swinging bases covered. The mix of strategic planning and in-your-face swordplay here has definitely got me interested, and I can’t wait to check it out myself. The fields of battle call to me. Somebody fetch me my armor and sword.
paragraphs.cn: 一边是《中世纪编年史》带来的更贴近现实的历史冒险，另一边是今年早些时候《红色沙漠》的高魔奇幻，我的挥剑需求应该都能满足了。这款游戏将战略规划与直面交锋的剑术相结合，无疑引起了我的兴趣，我已经迫不及待想亲自体验了。战场在召唤我。谁去把我的盔甲和剑拿来。

manual_approved_issues.detail: opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 117
